note: NORMATIVE (backlog #18 — re-parked from gate 2, now shipped; D7's 'the stdlib DSSE profile remains normative' finally names an artifact). The Semantic Core DSSE profile: an Attestation's `envelope-ref` resolves to a DSSE envelope of this shape, living BESIDE the content manifest — nothing signed contains its own signature (D3). payloadType is fixed; the payload is the base64 of the Attestation object's canonical form (RFC 8785 member ordering, annotations excluded — the same canonicalization as the semantic digest). Signature verification input is DSSE PAE(payloadType, payload) per the DSSE v1 specification. Verification tier: Portable and above (`attestation-binds`, B.1.7); Core carries the envelope passively. This descriptor is transport, not semantics: modifies-semantics [].
